changelog:
## [vv0.1.89](releases/tag/vv0.1.89) - 2025-05-25
<!-- bump-type:patch -->
### New Features

- Sync armor rotation for players ([#363](/issues/363))
- make tab (players list) keybindign configurable and add a way to assign to a gamepad button [`9726257`](/commit/972625757792641490a01efa12f59edfaa314fb8)
- **config**: Add support for remote dynamic splash text ([#358](/issues/358))
- improved splash text loading for better UI [`b4df2e1`](/commit/b4df2e18379c9ee4b73ed38696e4a002a5a79eea)
### Bug Fixes

- restore VR support. Fix rotation / position camera bugs [`0c68e63`](/commit/0c68e63ba619fcd39a9dbb9eb8fe8cdf689c4282)
- do not display capture lock message when possilbe (avoid flickering - do strategy switch) [`9726257`](/commit/972625757792641490a01efa12f59edfaa314fb8)
- item textures in inventory break after loading resourcepack ([#362](/issues/362))
- update tab header/footer in real time, use player display name in tab [`5ea2ab9`](/commit/5ea2ab9c1af1c30d16bd3fcbcd416760de307289)
- fix hanging forever server ping and weboscket connections [`b36d085`](/commit/b36d08528f70ee5e7896ea76650a7e6f733bf66d)
- optimized splash text loading [`5efe350`](/commit/5efe3508dfaf13c0bb72eda17fde208fe95980be)
- improoved the code [`b2a1bd1`](/commit/b2a1bd10e45bdfe68aefe41331853782711f067c)
